theme: Mixer #28 — Moving to a New City

sentences.english: Moving to a new city is exciting but terrifying at the same time, because you don't know anyone.
sentences.korean: 새 도시로 이사하는 건 설레지만 동시에 무서워요. 아는 사람이 없으니까요.

sentences.english: I joined a local sports club to meet people when I moved.
sentences.korean: 이사했을 때 사람들을 만나려고 지역 스포츠 클럽에 가입했어요.

sentences.english: It was the best way to make friends quickly.
The hardest part of moving to a new city was finding a good dentist, a good hairdresser, and a good restaurant.
sentences.korean: 새 도시 이사에서 가장 힘든 건 좋은 치과 좋은 미용실 좋은 식당을 찾는 거였어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Mixer #28 — Moving to a New City
